title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama. Chat, generate, embed, pull, and list local models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers. Same generate/chat/embed calls as the Python lib.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration letting you swap in any Ollama-hosted model as an LLM or chat endpoint.

title: ollama-webui (formerly ollama-ui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama comparable to ChatGPT UI: folders, sharing, prompts, model management.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Lightweight React/Electron desktop GUI for chatting with local Ollama models.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based CLI that wraps Ollama’s REST API with fuzzy finding, conversation history, and syntax highlighting.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: GitHub Copilot-style VS Code extension that uses Ollama models for local code completion.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support and PVC model cache.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official container images (CPU & CUDA) plus docker-compose examples for Ollama.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama + Chroma + LangChain to chat with local PDFs.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that brings Ollama models into any server with slash commands and threads.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app that lets teams query local Ollama models via DMs or app mentions.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds an Ollama sidebar for summarizing notes, brainstorming, and Q&A.

title: ollama-nvim
summary: Neovim plugin for inline code generation, explanation, and chat using Ollama models.

title: ollama-models
summary: Registry of community-contributed Modelfiles for Llama, Mistral, CodeLlama, Vicuna, etc.

title: ollama-pypi
summary: PyPI landing page for the official ollama Python package.

title: npm-ollama
summary: npm page for the official ollama JavaScript package.

title: r/ollama - Local LLMs ecosystem discussion
summary: Active subreddit for sharing Modelfiles, integrations, benchmarks, and troubleshooting.
